name: Portfolio Chatbot
description: A chatbot that answers questions based on the api.pphat.me project - a RESTful API built with Cloudflare Workers, Hono, and D1.

skills.name: Greeting
skills.description: Responds to greetings and introduces the chatbot.
skills.response: Hello! I'm the official chatbot for the api.pphat.me project. I can help you understand our architecture, tech stack, and API features. How can I assist you today?

skills.name: Portfolio Overview
skills.description: Provides an overview of the project architecture and purpose.
skills.response: This project is a high-performance RESTful API managing articles, projects, authors, and tags. It follows a modular architecture and is designed for the Cloudflare Developer Platform.

skills.name: Tech Stack
skills.description: Lists the technologies used in the project.
skills.response:
The tech stack includes: 
- **Runtime**: Cloudflare Workers
- **Router**: Hono v4
- **Database**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Testing**: Vitest with @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers
- **Tooling**: Wrangler v4

skills.name: Project Modules
skills.description: Provides details about specific modules in the API.
skills.response:
The API is organized into several modules: 
- **Articles**: CRUD operations, stats, reactions, and comments.
- **Projects**: Portfolio project management with extended details.
- **Authors & Tags**: Managing contributors and content categorization.
- **Auth**: Secure email-based authentication with JWT and OTP.

skills.name: Contact Information
skills.response: You can reach out to Sophat L. via email at info.sophat@gmail.com. You can also find more information at https://pphat.me.
